items.special_treatment: The paper provides detailed specific activities (U mg⁻¹) for a wide range of substrates (alcohols, aldehydes, ketones) with purified RADH, as well as kinetic parameters (Vmax, Km, Ki) for selected substrates. Stereoselectivity is reported for alpha-hydroxy ketones (ee > 99%, de > 99%). No explicit yield or conversion percentages are given for preparative-scale reactions; all data are based on initial rate measurements under defined assay conditions. The results are summarized in Tables II–IV (substrate range, specific activities) and Table V (kinetic parameters).
